title: lathyrus macranthus
intro: Lathyrus macranthus, also known as the large-flowered pea or lathyrus, is a perennial flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and improve blood circulation. The health benefits of Lathyrus macranthus include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its seeds can be used to make a poultice or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
